revision_priority: Rewrite the Summary into exactly 3 one-sentence bullets with `**Header:**` formatting and stronger senior full-stack ownership framing.
Split Skills into shorter categories and add one explicit JavaScript body bullet, ideally inside the TikTok or DiDi React/TypeScript work.
revision_instructions: 1) Replace the three Summary bullets with three one-sentence bullets in the same order. Keep the technical claims, but remove the current fragment-style phrasing and make each line read as a complete sentence ending with a period. For the first sentence, keep the analytics-to-engineering bridge but frame it as full-stack ownership rather than a transition story. 2) Rework `## Skills` into 4-5 shorter categories so each line stays within the stated density cap. A safe split is Frontend, Backend, Data, Cloud, and AI/DevOps; preserve every technology and avoid bolding individual technologies. 3) Add `JavaScript` to one existing work bullet in the body, preferably the TikTok React/TypeScript UI bullet or the DiDi portal bullet, so the JD must-have is evidenced in experience copy rather than only in Summary/Skills. 4) Do not change the immutable job headers, dates, or locations.
